name: lexoire-voice-automation
description: Unified Lexoire workspace for voice-driven Copilot automation

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.build:swift: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const os=require('os'); if(os.platform()!=='darwin'){console.log('Skipping Swift speech build on non-Darwin'); process.exit(0)} const result=spawnSync('swiftc',['swift/LexoireSpeech.swift','-o','swift/LexoireSpeech'],{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1)"
scripts.build: npm run build:swift && npm run speech:model:prepare && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm run electron
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && electron-builder build --publish never
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && electron-builder build --mac --publish never --config.mac.identity=null
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && electron-builder build --win --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && electron-builder build --linux --publish never
scripts.electron:build:all: npm run build && electron-builder build --mac --win --linux --publish never --config.mac.identity=null
scripts.electron:release:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never --config.mac.identity=null
scripts.electron:release:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.electron:release:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --x64 --publish never
scripts.electron:pack:local: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir --publish never --config.mac.identity=null

extendInfo.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: LEXOIRE needs speech recognition access to transcribe your voice commands.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: LEXOIRE needs microphone access to listen for your voice commands.
extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: LEXOIRE needs audio capture access to process your voice commands.
